title: Fumigate soil
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Fumigate soil demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Plan fumigation

pcs.text: Determine the need for fumigation as an option for pest management strategy of the workplace
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the need for fumigation as an option for pest management strategy of the workplace?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the need for fumigation as an option for pest management strategy of the workplace.

pcs.text: Assess site and soil conditions for suitability of fumigation as a method to use
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess site and soil conditions for suitability of fumigation as a method to use?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess site and soil conditions for suitability of fumigation as a method to use.

pcs.text: Select method of fumigant and application equipment to suit type of pest and soil or media to be treated
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select method of fumigant and application equipment to suit type of pest and soil or media to be treated?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select method of fumigant and application equipment to suit type of pest and soil or media to be treated.

pcs.text: Identify and select fumigant and its application rate according to chemical label
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and select fumigant and its application rate according to chemical label?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and select fumigant and its application rate according to chemical label.

pcs.text: Identify hazards, assess risks and implement control measures for soil and media fumigation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards, assess risks and implement control measures for soil and media fumigation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards, assess risks and implement control measures for soil and media fumigation.

pcs.text: Establish site security measures to control access during fumigation and prescribed re-entry periods according to chemical label and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish site security measures to control access during fumigation and prescribed re-entry periods according to chemical label and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish site security measures to control access during fumigation and prescribed re-entry periods according to chemical label and workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Determine appropriate personal protective equipment according to fumigant safety requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine appropriate personal protective equipment according to fumigant safety requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine appropriate personal protective equipment according to fumigant safety requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Plan fumigation

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement controls and site security measures according to workplace procedures.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure site emergency procedures are in place and ready to implement.

elements.title: Prepare application equipment and fumigants
